Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION

Title: Relates to risk assessment instruments for sex offenders
Summary: Relates to the use of validated risk assessment instruments for sex offenders to determine the risk of repeat offense.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the correction law, in relation to risk assessment instruments for sex offenders
